id: SQL = RDBMS --> relational database managemant system use to store data in rows and columns into table
select = use to fetch data from table
insert = to put values into rows in table
delete = remove one or more rows from table
grant = to give user access previlege to database
revoke = to take out permission from user
commit = save all transaction to database
savepoint = rollback transaction to certain point
create = use to create table into datbase
